message:
feat(cli): wire unified query contract into CLI and robot search with until/mode args

main.rs (+326/-88):
- Add \`--until\` and \`--mode\` flags to both \`ft search\` and
  \`ft robot search\` commands via clap \`#[arg]\` derives
- Add \`SearchModeArg\` enum (Lexical/Semantic/Hybrid) with ValueEnum
  derive and \`From<SearchModeArg>\` for UnifiedSearchMode conversion
- Replace inline FTS5 lint checking + SearchOptions construction in
  robot search handler with \`parse_unified_search_query()\` +
  \`to_storage_search_options()\` + \`ensure_mode_supported()\` from
  query_contract, eliminating ~40 lines of duplicated validation logic
- Replace inline lint + SearchOptions in human CLI search handler
  with the same query_contract pipeline, including structured JSON
  error output with error_code/hint/lint fields matching robot mode
- Remove now-unused \`format_search_lint_hint()\` helper (replaced by
  query_contract's built-in error formatting)
- Add \`until_filter\` and \`mode\` fields to RobotSearchData response
- Fix \`.into()\` error return in resize timeline JSON validation
  (was missing the \`.into()\` for anyhow conversion)
- Add CLI parse tests: \`cli_search_parses_time_window_and_mode\`
  (since/until/hybrid) and \`cli_robot_search_parses_until_snippets_and_mode\`
  (until/snippets=false/semantic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
